title: Finland Form 50A — Earned Income and Deductions
description: The Finnish Tax Administration's (Vero, Verohallinto) form 3023e, "50A – Earned income and deductions," used to report earned income (wages, salaries, fees, compensation, pensions, and benefits) missing from a taxpayer's pre-completed tax return, or to correct information already on it, together with deductions from earned income, child support paid, international-taxation elections, custody of children living outside Finland, and a permanent separation from a spouse during the tax year. The form's own instructions state that receipts and free-form clarifications must not be enclosed; the Tax Administration will request them separately if needed, so this schema publishes no documents[] entries. It can be filed on paper without any prior authentication, though the Tax Administration's own e-filing channel (MyTax) is the primary route for taxpayers who can authenticate. This document describes the form only; it does not submit anything on the taxpayer's behalf, and does not imply Finnish government endorsement. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Republic of Finland or the Finnish Tax Administration.

source.documentRef: 3023e, "50A – Earned income and deductions" (VEROH 3023e 1.2025) — Vero's own English-language fillable AcroForm PDF

verification.notes: GOV-2308 "GovSchema Standard Research" cycle. Opens Finland's Taxes vertical (4 of 6 verticals; Passport is a confirmed dead end and only DMV remains open, already confirmed weak -- Traficom's core flows are Suomi.fi-login-gated or in-person only). This form was already CATALOG.md's own confirmed-strong Known Gaps candidate (item 7), flagged across three prior cycles (GOV-2276/GOV-2292/GOV-2299); no fresh scouting was needed. Fetched fresh from vero.fi with a plain HTTP GET: HTTP 200, 233,558 bytes (matching the issue's own pre-recorded figure exactly), genuine %PDF-1.7, 4 pages, no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate, footer edition "VEROH 3023e 1.2025". A pdfjs-dist extraction (reproduced twice, with and without an intent filter) resolved 135 raw /Widget annotations (115 Tx, 20 Btn, 0 Ch) across 126 unique field names -- matching CATALOG.md's own separately-recorded pre-scout figure ("135 Widget/126 FT fields") exactly, though not the GOV-2308 issue text's own stated figure (141 widgets/127 names/17 Btn), a discrepancy disclosed in this document's own VERIFICATION.md rather than silently reconciled. 3 of the 126 names are page-navigation/utility controls (Print, To first page, Reset), clustered once on page 4 only, excluded as non-data-collecting UI chrome. A disposable reconciliation script mapped all 126 unique widget names to exactly one fields[] entry (0 unmapped), consolidating -- via 32 euro/cent split-widget merges (this registry's established convention) and two bounded repeating groups flattened by ordinal suffix (2 wages-income rows; 3 custody-of-children-outside-Finland rows, matching this registry's dk/cpr precedent) -- to 92 fields[] entries and 0 documents[] entries. The zero documents[] count is a disclosed structural fact, not an oversight: the form's own instructions state verbatim not to enclose any receipts, since the Tax Administration requests them separately if needed. Several source-form naming quirks are disclosed in the document's own VERIFICATION.md: an inconsistent comma/semicolon widget-name convention across the four child-support child-identity-code fields; a semantically bare '1'/'s1' field-name pair for the foreign-pension tax credit, modelled by its own tooltip instead; a spousal-separation field that is a single text (not checkbox+date) widget, modelled as one optional date field whose presence signals the separation occurred; and custody-type checkbox pairs that are two same-named Btn widgets per row without the PDF-level radioButton flag this registry's fi/dvv precedent had, modelled as a per-row enum regardless. Two mock conformance scenarios (a minimal single filer exercising only the 3 statically-required header fields; a full-coverage filer with two wages payors, a car benefit, a pension, a benefit, every deduction category, child support for two children, a full set of international-situation elections, two children with custody outside Finland, and a spousal separation) were run against a from-scratch interpreter script walking fields[]/crossFieldValidation[] directly: 0 errors on both, plus 5 independent mutation controls (two dropped statically-required header fields; two requiredWhen-gated special-deduction cost fields each omitted while their gating checkbox is true; one reversed tax-at-source employment-period date pair) each correctly raised exactly 1 error. The same script confirmed every requiredWhen/crossFieldValidation field reference resolves (0 dangling references). Validated clean with node tools/validate.mjs and node tools/validate-ajv.mjs, individually and as part of the full registry run.

fields.name: fullName
fields.label: Your name
fields.description: The taxpayer's full name, printed as a repeated header field on every page of the form.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 1/4: "Your name"

fields.name: personalIdentityCode
fields.label: Personal identity code
fields.description: The taxpayer's Finnish personal identity code (henkilötunnus), printed as a repeated header field on every page of the form.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 1/4: "Personal identity code"

fields.name: taxYear
fields.label: Tax year
fields.description: The calendar tax year this correction/supplement applies to, printed as a repeated header field on every page of the form.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 1/4: "Tax year"

fields.name: wagesPayorId1

fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 1/4: "Payor’s Business ID or personal identity code"

fields.name: wagesPayorName1
fields.label: Payor's name (row 1)

fields.description: Free-text description of the type of income (e.g. cash wages and fringe benefits).
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 1/4: "Type of income (e.g. cash wages and fringe benefits)"

fields.name: wagesGrossIncome1
fields.label: Gross income, euro (row 1)
fields.description: Gross wage/salary/fee/compensation income missing from or to be corrected on the pre-completed tax return. The source specimen splits this amount across two adjacent boxes (whole euros, cents); this schema models the combined euro amount as a single decimal value.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 1/4: "Gross income"

fields.name: wagesWithholdingTax1
fields.label: Withholding tax, euro (row 1)
fields.description: Withholding tax on the reported wage/salary/fee/compensation income. The source specimen splits this amount across two adjacent boxes (whole euros, cents); this schema models the combined euro amount as a single decimal value.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 1/4: "Withholding tax"

fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 1/4: "Statutory pension insurance contributions (withheld by the employer)"

fields.name: taxAtSourceEmploymentPeriod3Start
fields.label: Tax at source deduction: period of employment 3, start date
fields.description: Start date of a period of employment supporting a tax-at-source deduction claim, for a non-resident taxpayer who is a leased employee, printed as dd.mm.yyyy on the form (up to four periods).
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 3/4: "Period of employment (ddmmyyyy–ddmmyyyy)"

fields.name: taxAtSourceEmploymentPeriod3End
fields.label: Tax at source deduction: period of employment 3, end date
fields.description: End date of the corresponding period of employment supporting a tax-at-source deduction claim.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 3/4: "Period of employment (ddmmyyyy–ddmmyyyy)"

fields.name: taxAtSourceEmploymentPeriod4Start
fields.label: Tax at source deduction: period of employment 4, start date
fields.description: Start date of a period of employment supporting a tax-at-source deduction claim, for a non-resident taxpayer who is a leased employee, printed as dd.mm.yyyy on the form (up to four periods).
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 3/4: "Period of employment (ddmmyyyy–ddmmyyyy)"

fields.name: taxAtSourceEmploymentPeriod4End
fields.label: Tax at source deduction: period of employment 4, end date
fields.description: End date of the corresponding period of employment supporting a tax-at-source deduction claim.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 3/4: "Period of employment (ddmmyyyy–ddmmyyyy)"

fields.name: taxAtSourceTotalWorkdays
fields.label: Total number of workdays
fields.description: Total number of workdays across the reported employment periods, supporting the tax-at-source deduction claim.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 3/4: "Total number of workdays"

fields.name: foreignTaxCreditOnFinnishPension
fields.label: Crediting of tax paid abroad on a Finnish-sourced pension, euro
fields.description: Amount of tax paid abroad on a pension received from Finland, for which a reverse credit is claimed.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 3/4: "I have paid tax abroad on a pension I have received from Finland (see the instructions for completing the form)."

fields.name: childOutsideFinlandName1
fields.label: Child's name (child outside Finland, row 1)
fields.description: Name of the first child who does not have a Finnish personal identity code, for whom custody outside Finland is being reported. Reportable only if the taxpayer holds a certificate from the child's country of residence proving guardianship.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "Child’s name"

fields.name: childOutsideFinlandDateOfBirth1
fields.label: Date of birth (child outside Finland, row 1)
fields.description: Date of birth of the child.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "Date of birth (ddmmyyyy)"

fields.name: childOutsideFinlandCustodyType1
fields.label: Type of child custody (row 1)
fields.description: Whether the taxpayer has joint or sole custody of the child.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "Type of child custody ☐ Joint custody ☐ Sole custody"

fields.name: childOutsideFinlandCustodyEndDate1
fields.label: End date of child custody (row 1)
fields.description: End date of child custody, if custody ended during the tax year.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "End date of child custody (ddmmyyyy)"

fields.name: childOutsideFinlandName2
fields.label: Child's name (child outside Finland, row 2)
fields.description: Name of the second child who does not have a Finnish personal identity code, for whom custody outside Finland is being reported. Reportable only if the taxpayer holds a certificate from the child's country of residence proving guardianship.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "Child’s name"

fields.name: childOutsideFinlandDateOfBirth2
fields.label: Date of birth (child outside Finland, row 2)
fields.description: Date of birth of the child.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "Date of birth (ddmmyyyy)"

fields.name: childOutsideFinlandCustodyType2
fields.label: Type of child custody (row 2)
fields.description: Whether the taxpayer has joint or sole custody of the child.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "Type of child custody ☐ Joint custody ☐ Sole custody"

fields.name: childOutsideFinlandCustodyEndDate2
fields.label: End date of child custody (row 2)
fields.description: End date of child custody, if custody ended during the tax year.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "End date of child custody (ddmmyyyy)"

fields.name: childOutsideFinlandName3
fields.label: Child's name (child outside Finland, row 3)
fields.description: Name of the third child who does not have a Finnish personal identity code, for whom custody outside Finland is being reported. Reportable only if the taxpayer holds a certificate from the child's country of residence proving guardianship.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "Child’s name"

fields.name: childOutsideFinlandDateOfBirth3
fields.label: Date of birth (child outside Finland, row 3)
fields.description: Date of birth of the child.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "Date of birth (ddmmyyyy)"

fields.name: childOutsideFinlandCustodyType3
fields.label: Type of child custody (row 3)
fields.description: Whether the taxpayer has joint or sole custody of the child.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "Type of child custody ☐ Joint custody ☐ Sole custody"

fields.name: childOutsideFinlandCustodyEndDate3
fields.label: End date of child custody (row 3)
fields.description: End date of child custody, if custody ended during the tax year.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "End date of child custody (ddmmyyyy)"

fields.name: spouseSeparationDate
fields.label: My spouse and I have separated permanently during the tax year
fields.description: Date the taxpayer and their spouse separated permanently during the tax year, if applicable. The source specimen prints this as a single date field directly following the declarative sentence, rather than as a separate checkbox plus date; presence of a value is what indicates the separation occurred.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "My spouse and I have separated permanently during the tax year."

fields.name: signatureDate
fields.label: Date
fields.description: Date the form is signed.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "Date"

fields.name: signature
fields.label: Signature
fields.description: The taxpayer prints and signs their name by hand; the form must be printed out for this.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "Signature"

fields.name: telephoneNumber
fields.label: Telephone number
fields.description: The taxpayer's telephone number, for the Tax Administration to use if clarification is needed.
fields.sourceRef: VEROH 3023e 1.2025, "50A – Earned income and deductions", page 4/4: "Telephone number"
